name: stack-pill
description: A pill for the Stackdrop team to easily setup the base needed skills and plugins for all projects. One command installs Impeccable, Superpowers, Graphify, the mattpocock skills, Context7, Playwright, skill-creator, chrome-devtools-mcp, CodeRabbit, and ponytail — plus a built-in guide that teaches Claude how and when to use them.
